case_title: NIDHI CHINAI VS. HUNG KEE YUAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-11-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, HUNG KEE
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NIDHI CHINAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUNG KEE YUAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER HENRY YOUNG, ALSO A WITNESS, PROPERTY MANAGER. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG WILL NOT ALLOW MR. YOUNG TO TASK BOTH ROLES AS INTERPRETER AND WITNESS. PARTIES REVIEWED DOCUMENTATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NIDHI CHINAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUNG KEE YUAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN AND WITH WITNESS HENRY YOUNG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINAI, NIDHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUAN, HUNG KEE $5,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,875.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,887.60 FILED BY CHINAI, NIDHI AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, HUNG KEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2021 - JUDGMENT.
